assertions.name: uses-output-format
assertions.description: Report follows output-format.md structure with score, summary, and findings sections

assertions.name: includes-score
assertions.description: Contains a numeric score out of 10

assertions.name: catches-naming-violation
assertions.description: Flags the camelCase 'value' property (should be PascalCase 'Value')

assertions.name: catches-mutability
assertions.description: Flags mutable 'set' accessor on value object property

assertions.name: catches-factory-name
assertions.description: Flags factory method 'Create' should be 'Of' per project convention

assertions.name: catches-test-naming
assertions.description: Flags test methods don't follow naming convention (What_Condition_Expected)

assertions.name: references-file-lines
assertions.description: Includes specific file:line references in findings
